scripts.dev-items: while true; do watch --chgexit -n 0.5 'echo $(sha256sum ./categories.json); echo $(sha256sum ./scripts/patchItems.js)'; npm run update-item-list; done
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const rm=p=>fs.existsSync(p)&&fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); rm('./index.html'); rm('./dist'); rm('./public/dist'); console.log('Cleaned.');"
